content:
Maybe it’s not about avoiding the crash. But it’s about setting a breakpoint to find the flaw in the code, fix it, and carry on until we hit the next flaw.

The quest to keep going, to always fight for footing.

Maybe we’re all just stumbling from the right questions to the wrong answers. Or from the right answers to the wrong questions.

It doesn’t matter where you go or where you come from, as long as you keep stumbling.

Maybe that’s all it takes. Maybe that’s as good as it gets.

Mr. Robot_2.0 Ep.3
